channel.title: Senior+ Software Engineering Lead Berlin
channel.description: Hi, I'm Matt. A Senior+ (Lead / Staff / Principle) Software Engineer based in Berlin. With experience right across the stack and specialism in the Front-End, I've been building for, and leading teams that build for the web, for over 20 years.

item.title: How to make your own Glitch Art in 5 easy steps
Open for new opportunties beginning March 2019
item.description: After 12 months with the team at Field, tackling the challenges of Vaccine delivery logistics across Africa, it's time to move on and I'll be leaving in a few weeks to explore new pastures.

item.title: HTML & CSS First Progressively Enhanced Global Theme Switch
